WITH ranked_schools AS (     SELECT          s.CDSCode,         s.School,         s.County,         ss.AvgScrRead,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank     FROM schools s     INNER JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds     WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'          AND ss.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL ) SELECT School  FROM ranked_schools  WHERE rank <= 5  ORDER BY County, rank;

1058: WITH HeightExtremes AS (     SELECT player_api_id     FROM Player     WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)        OR height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) ), AvgFinishing AS (     SELECT player_api_id, AVG(finishing) AS avg_finish     FROM Player_Attributes     WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM HeightExtremes)     GROUP BY player_api_id ) SELECT P.player_name FROM Player P JOIN AvgFinishing AF ON P.player_api_id = AF.player_api_id WHERE AF.avg_finish = (SELECT MAX(avg_finish) FROM AvgFinishing)

WITH height_extremes AS (     SELECT MAX(height) AS max_height, MIN(height) AS min_height FROM Player ), extreme_players AS (     SELECT player_api_id FROM Player      WHERE height = (SELECT max_height FROM height_extremes)         OR height = (SELECT min_height FROM height_extremes) ), avg_finishing_by_player AS (     SELECT player_api_id, AVG(finishing) AS avg_finish      FROM Player_Attributes      WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM extreme_players)      GROUP BY player_api_id ), max_avg_finish AS (     SELECT MAX(avg_finish) AS max_avg FROM avg_finishing_by_player ) SELECT player_name  FROM Player  WHERE player_api_id IN (     SELECT player_api_id      FROM avg_finishing_by_player      WHERE avg_finish = (SELECT max_avg FROM max_avg_finish) )

SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.height IN (     (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player),     (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) ) GROUP BY T1.player_api_id ORDER BY AVG(T2.finishing) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE player_api_id = (     SELECT player_api_id     FROM (         SELECT player_api_id, AVG(finishing) AS avg_finishing         FROM Player_Attributes         WHERE player_api_id IN (             SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)             UNION             SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)         )         GROUP BY player_api_id         ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC         LIMIT 1     ) )

WITH HeightExtremes AS (     SELECT player_api_id     FROM Player     WHERE height IN (         (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player),         (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)     ) ), AvgFinishing AS (     SELECT player_api_id, AVG(finishing) AS avg_finish     FROM Player_Attributes     WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM HeightExtremes)     GROUP BY player_api_id ) SELECT P.player_name FROM Player P INNER JOIN AvgFinishing AF ON P.player_api_id = AF.player_api_id WHERE AF.avg_finish = (SELECT MAX(avg_finish) FROM AvgFinishing)
116: SELECT ((t2.balance - t1.balance) * 100.0 / t1.balance) AS increase_rate FROM trans t1, trans t2 WHERE t1.account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM loan WHERE date = '1993-07-05' ORDER BY loan_id ASC LIMIT 1)   AND t1.date = '1993-03-22'   AND t2.account_id = t1.account_id   AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'

SELECT ((B2.balance - B1.balance) * 100.0 / B1.balance) AS increase_rate FROM (     SELECT T1.account_id     FROM disp AS T1     JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id     WHERE T2.date = '1993-07-05' AND T1.type = 'OWNER'     ORDER BY T2.loan_id ASC     LIMIT 1 ) AS A JOIN trans AS B1 ON A.account_id = B1.account_id AND B1.date = '1993-03-22' JOIN trans AS B2 ON A.account_id = B2.account_id AND B2.date = '1998-12-27'

WITH target_account AS (   SELECT T1.account_id   FROM loan AS T1   INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id   WHERE T1.date = '1993-07-05' AND T3.type = 'OWNER'   ORDER BY T1.loan_id ASC   LIMIT 1 ), balance_1993 AS (   SELECT balance   FROM trans   WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM target_account)     AND date <= '1993-03-22'   ORDER BY date DESC   LIMIT 1 ), balance_1998 AS (   SELECT balance   FROM trans   WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM target_account)     AND date <= '1998-12-27'   ORDER BY date DESC   LIMIT 1 ) SELECT ((b1998.balance - b1993.balance) * 100.0 / b1993.balance) AS increase_rate FROM balance_1993 AS b1993, balance_1998 AS b1998

SELECT ((B2.balance - B1.balance) * 100.0 / B1.balance) AS increase_rate FROM (   SELECT balance FROM trans    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM loan WHERE date = '1993-07-05' ORDER BY loan_id ASC LIMIT 1)      AND date = '1993-03-22' ) AS B1 CROSS JOIN (   SELECT balance FROM trans    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM loan WHERE date = '1993-07-05' ORDER BY loan_id ASC LIMIT 1)      AND date = '1998-12-27' ) AS B2

1241: SELECT   SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_count,   SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_count,   (SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS difference FROM (   SELECT DISTINCT ID, PLT FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL AND (PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400) ) AS abnormal_patients

SELECT   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS lower_count,   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS higher_count,   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS difference FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL AND (PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400)

SELECT   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS lower_count,   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS higher_count,   (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END)) AS comparison FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL AND (PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400)

SELECT   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS lower_count,   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS higher_count,   (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END)) AS comparison FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400

1482: WITH segment_consumption AS (   SELECT     c.Segment,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013   FROM yearmonth ym   INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'     AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')     AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')   GROUP BY c.Segment ), segment_increase AS (   SELECT     Segment,     (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,     (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / NULLIF(consumption_2013, 0) AS percentage_increase   FROM segment_consumption   WHERE consumption_2013 > 0 ) SELECT   Segment,   percentage_increase FROM segment_increase WHERE percentage_increase = (SELECT MAX(percentage_increase) FROM segment_increase)    OR percentage_increase = (SELECT MIN(percentage_increase) FROM segment_increase) ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC

WITH segment_consumption AS (   SELECT     c.Segment,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013   FROM yearmonth ym   INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'     AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')     AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')   GROUP BY c.Segment ), segment_increase AS (   SELECT     Segment,     consumption_2012,     consumption_2013,     (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,     (CASE       WHEN consumption_2013 > 0 THEN (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013       ELSE NULL     END) AS percentage_increase   FROM segment_consumption ) SELECT   (SELECT Segment FROM segment_increase ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC LIMIT 1) AS biggest_increase_segment,   (SELECT Segment FROM segment_increase ORDER BY percentage_increase ASC LIMIT 1) AS lowest_increase_segment FROM segment_increase LIMIT 1

WITH segment_consumption AS (   SELECT     c.Segment,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013   FROM yearmonth ym   INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'     AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')     AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')   GROUP BY c.Segment ), segment_increase AS (   SELECT     Segment,     (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,     (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / NULLIF(consumption_2013, 0) AS percentage_increase   FROM segment_consumption ) SELECT   Segment,   percentage_increase FROM segment_increase WHERE percentage_increase = (SELECT MAX(percentage_increase) FROM segment_increase)    OR percentage_increase = (SELECT MIN(percentage_increase) FROM segment_increase) ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC

WITH filtered_data AS (   SELECT y.Consumption, c.Segment, SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) AS year   FROM yearmonth y   INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'     AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013') ), segment_totals AS (   SELECT Segment,          SUM(CASE WHEN year = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013,          SUM(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012   FROM filtered_data   GROUP BY Segment ), segment_percentage AS (   SELECT Segment,          (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013 * 100.0 AS percentage_increase   FROM segment_totals   WHERE consumption_2013 > 0 ) SELECT Segment, percentage_increase FROM segment_percentage WHERE percentage_increase = (SELECT MAX(percentage_increase) FROM segment_percentage)    OR percentage_increase = (SELECT MIN(percentage_increase) FROM segment_percentage) ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH segment_consumption AS (   SELECT     c.Segment,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013   FROM yearmonth ym   INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'     AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')     AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')   GROUP BY c.Segment ), segment_percentage AS (   SELECT     Segment,     (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013 AS percentage_increase   FROM segment_consumption   WHERE consumption_2013 > 0 ) SELECT   Segment,   percentage_increase FROM segment_percentage WHERE percentage_increase = (SELECT MAX(percentage_increase) FROM segment_percentage)    OR percentage_increase = (SELECT MIN(percentage_increase) FROM segment_percentage) ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH DriverTotalWins AS (     SELECT driverId, SUM(wins) AS total_wins     FROM driverStandings     GROUP BY driverId ), MaxWins AS (     SELECT MAX(total_wins) AS max_total_wins     FROM DriverTotalWins ) SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, MAX(ds.points) AS max_points FROM drivers d INNER JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId WHERE d.driverId IN (     SELECT driverId     FROM DriverTotalWins     WHERE total_wins = (SELECT max_total_wins FROM MaxWins) ) GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality;

WITH DriverTotalWins AS (     SELECT driverId, SUM(wins) AS total_wins     FROM driverStandings     GROUP BY driverId ), MaxWins AS (     SELECT MAX(total_wins) AS max_total_wins     FROM DriverTotalWins ) SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, MAX(ds.points) AS max_points FROM drivers d INNER JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId WHERE d.driverId IN (     SELECT driverId     FROM DriverTotalWins     WHERE total_wins = (SELECT max_total_wins FROM MaxWins) ) GROUP BY d.driverId;

407: SELECT DISTINCT subtypes AS type FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT supertypes AS type FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL

197: SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) FROM (     SELECT a.molecule_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'o' THEN 1 END) AS oxygen_count     FROM atom a     WHERE a.molecule_id IN (         SELECT b.molecule_id         FROM bond b         GROUP BY b.molecule_id         HAVING COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AND COUNT(*) > 0     )     GROUP BY a.molecule_id )

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count)  FROM (     SELECT a.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.element = 'o' THEN a.atom_id END) AS oxygen_count     FROM bond b     INNER JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id     INNER JOIN atom a ON (c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id)     WHERE b.bond_type = '-'     GROUP BY a.molecule_id ) AS molecule_oxygen_counts

SELECT AVG(COALESCE(oxygen_count, 0))  FROM (     SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id      FROM bond      WHERE bond_type = '-' ) AS single_bonded_molecules LEFT JOIN (     SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count      FROM atom      WHERE element = 'o'      GROUP BY molecule_id ) AS oxygen_counts  ON single_bonded_molecules.molecule_id = oxygen_counts.molecule_id

SELECT AVG(COALESCE(oxygen_count, 0))   FROM (       SELECT b.molecule_id       FROM bond AS b       GROUP BY b.molecule_id       HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type != '-' OR b.bond_type IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0   ) AS single_mol   LEFT JOIN (       SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count       FROM atom       WHERE element = 'o'       GROUP BY molecule_id   ) AS ox ON single_mol.molecule_id = ox.molecule_id

SELECT AVG(T1.oxygen_count) FROM (SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count FROM atom WHERE element = 'o' GROUP BY molecule_id) AS T1 INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '-') AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id

83: SELECT 'Part 1: Count of magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types' AS description, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) AS value FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSserved = 'K-8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' UNION ALL SELECT 'Part 2: City and school count for K-8 grade span', NULL FROM (SELECT NULL) WHERE 1=0  -- This row is just to align columns for union UNION ALL SELECT T1.City, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) FROM schools AS T1 WHERE T1.GSserved = 'K-8' AND T1.City IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.City ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) DESC

SELECT 'Part 1: Magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types' AS Description, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) AS Count FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND (T1.GSoffered LIKE 'K-8' OR T1.GSserved LIKE 'K-8') AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' UNION ALL SELECT 'Part 2: City, School Count' AS Description, NULL AS Count FROM schools WHERE 1=0 UNION ALL SELECT City, COUNT(CDSCode) FROM schools WHERE (GSoffered LIKE 'K-8' OR GSserved LIKE 'K-8') GROUP BY City ORDER BY City;

SELECT 'Magnet K-8 with Multiple Provision' AS description, NULL AS city, COUNT(*) AS count FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSserved = 'K-8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' UNION ALL SELECT 'K-8 schools per city' AS description, City AS city, COUNT(*) AS count FROM schools WHERE GSserved = 'K-8' GROUP BY City

SELECT 'Magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types' AS Description, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) AS Count FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSserved = 'K-8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' UNION ALL SELECT 'City: ' || T1.City, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) FROM schools AS T1 WHERE T1.GSserved = 'K-8' GROUP BY T1.City

SELECT 'Magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types' AS Description, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CDSCode) AS Count  FROM schools AS T1  INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode  WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSserved = 'K-8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' UNION ALL SELECT City, COUNT(DISTINCT CDSCode)  FROM schools  WHERE GSserved = 'K-8'  GROUP BY City

1002: SELECT      d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,     d.nationality,     r.name AS first_race_name FROM drivers d INNER JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId INNER JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)   AND r.date = (       SELECT MIN(r2.date)       FROM results res2       INNER JOIN races r2 ON res2.raceId = r2.raceId       WHERE res2.driverId = d.driverId   ) LIMIT 1;

94: SELECT DISTINCT account.account_id AS account_number, (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) AS salary_gap FROM client INNER JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id AND disp.type = 'OWNER' INNER JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id INNER JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND client.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F') AND district.A11 = (SELECT MIN(d2.A11) FROM client c2 INNER JOIN disp dp2 ON c2.client_id = dp2.client_id AND dp2.type = 'OWNER' INNER JOIN account ac2 ON dp2.account_id = ac2.account_id INNER JOIN district d2 ON ac2.district_id = d2.district_id WHERE c2.gender = 'F' AND c2.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F'))

SELECT T1.account_id,         (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - MIN(T4.A11) AS gap FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F'   AND T2.client_id = (     SELECT T2.client_id      FROM client AS T2     INNER JOIN district AS T4 ON T2.district_id = T4.district_id     WHERE T2.gender = 'F'     ORDER BY T2.birth_date ASC, T4.A11 ASC     LIMIT 1   ) GROUP BY T1.account_id

SELECT T4.account_id,         ((SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district)) AS gap FROM account AS T4 WHERE T4.account_id IN (     SELECT T3.account_id     FROM client AS T1     INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id     INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id     WHERE T1.gender = 'F'       AND T2.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district)       AND T1.birth_date = (           SELECT MIN(birth_date)           FROM client           WHERE gender = 'F'             AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district))       ) )

SELECT account.account_id, (SELECT MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) FROM district) AS gap FROM client INNER JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id INNER JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id INNER JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id WHERE client.gender = 'F'   AND district.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) ORDER BY client.birth_date ASC LIMIT 1

WITH OldestFemaleClients AS (     SELECT client_id     FROM client     WHERE gender = 'F'       AND birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F') ), OldestFemaleAccounts AS (     SELECT d.account_id, a.district_id     FROM disp d     INNER JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id     WHERE d.client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM OldestFemaleClients) ), LowestSalary AS (     SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS min_salary     FROM district d     WHERE d.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM OldestFemaleAccounts) ), HighestLowest AS (     SELECT MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) AS salary_gap     FROM district ) SELECT account_id AS result FROM OldestFemaleAccounts oa INNER JOIN district d ON oa.district_id = d.district_id WHERE d.A11 = (SELECT min_salary FROM LowestSalary) UNION ALL SELECT salary_gap AS result FROM HighestLowest;

1481: WITH consumption_2013 AS ( SELECT c.Segment, ym.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth ym INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID ), segment_min_consumption AS ( SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption FROM consumption_2013 GROUP BY Segment ), least_customers AS ( SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, c.total_consumption FROM consumption_2013 c INNER JOIN segment_min_consumption s ON c.Segment = s.Segment AND c.total_consumption = s.min_consumption ), segment_avg_consumption AS ( SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption FROM least_customers GROUP BY Segment ) SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS SME_minus_LAM, MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS LAM_minus_KAM, MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption END) AS KAM_minus_SME FROM segment_avg_consumption

WITH segment_min_consumers AS (   SELECT c.Segment, ym.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_2013   FROM yearmonth ym   INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'     AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'   GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID ), segment_min AS (   SELECT Segment, MIN(total_2013) AS min_total   FROM segment_min_consumers   GROUP BY Segment ), segment_avg AS (   SELECT smc.Segment,          SUM(smc.total_2013) AS segment_total,          COUNT(*) AS customer_count,          SUM(smc.total_2013) / COUNT(*) AS annual_avg   FROM segment_min_consumers smc   INNER JOIN segment_min sm ON smc.Segment = sm.Segment AND smc.total_2013 = sm.min_total   GROUP BY smc.Segment ) SELECT   SME.avg - LAM.avg AS SME_minus_LAM,   LAM.avg - KAM.avg AS LAM_minus_KAM,   KAM.avg - SME.avg AS KAM_minus_SME FROM   (SELECT annual_avg AS avg FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS SME,   (SELECT annual_avg AS avg FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS LAM,   (SELECT annual_avg AS avg FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS KAM

WITH Consumption2013 AS ( SELECT y.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK' GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment ), MinConsumptionPerSegment AS ( SELECT Segment, MIN(TotalConsumption) AS MinTotalConsumption FROM Consumption2013 GROUP BY Segment ), MinConsumptionCustomers AS ( SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment FROM Consumption2013 c JOIN MinConsumptionPerSegment m ON c.Segment = m.Segment AND c.TotalConsumption = m.MinTotalConsumption ), MonthlyDataForMinCustomers AS ( SELECT y.CustomerID, m.Segment, y.Consumption FROM yearmonth y JOIN MinConsumptionCustomers m ON y.CustomerID = m.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' ), SegmentAverages AS ( SELECT Segment, AVG(Consumption) AS AvgConsumption FROM MonthlyDataForMinCustomers GROUP BY Segment ) SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN AvgConsumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN AvgConsumption END) AS SME_LAM_diff, MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN AvgConsumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN AvgConsumption END) AS LAM_KAM_diff, MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN AvgConsumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN AvgConsumption END) AS KAM_SME_diff FROM SegmentAverages

WITH segment_avg AS (   SELECT c.Segment, AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption   FROM yearmonth AS ym   INNER JOIN customers AS c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID   WHERE SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'     AND c.Currency = 'CZK'     AND ym.CustomerID IN (       SELECT CustomerID       FROM (         SELECT c.Segment, ym.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons,                MIN(SUM(ym.Consumption)) OVER (PARTITION BY c.Segment) AS min_cons         FROM yearmonth AS ym         INNER JOIN customers AS c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID         WHERE SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'           AND c.Currency = 'CZK'         GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID       ) AS t       WHERE total_cons = min_cons     )   GROUP BY c.Segment ) SELECT    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption END) -   MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS SME_LAM_diff,   MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) -   MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS LAM_KAM_diff,   MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) -   MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption END) AS KAM_SME_diff FROM segment_avg

WITH customers_2013_total AS ( SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_2013 FROM customers c INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment ), segment_min_consumption AS ( SELECT Segment, MIN(total_2013) AS min_total FROM customers_2013_total GROUP BY Segment ), least_consumption_customers AS ( SELECT ctc.CustomerID, ctc.Segment FROM customers_2013_total ctc INNER JOIN segment_min_consumption smc ON ctc.Segment = smc.Segment AND ctc.total_2013 = smc.min_total ), monthly_consumption_least AS ( SELECT lc.Segment, ym.Consumption FROM least_consumption_customers lc INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON lc.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' ), segment_avg AS ( SELECT Segment, AVG(Consumption) AS avg_consumption FROM monthly_consumption_least GROUP BY Segment ) SELECT (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM, (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM, (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;

1526: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS decrease_rate FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ( SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8 )

WITH target_customer AS (     SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k      WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25' ), consumption_2012 AS (     SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS total_2012 FROM yearmonth      WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)      AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2012' ), consumption_2013 AS (     SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS total_2013 FROM yearmonth      WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)      AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2013' ) SELECT (total_2012 - total_2013) / total_2012 AS decrease_rate  FROM consumption_2012, consumption_2013

SELECT      (SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -       SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /      SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS decrease_rate FROM yearmonth y WHERE y.CustomerID = (     SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k      WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25' ) GROUP BY y.CustomerID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > 0

SELECT     (SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', y.Date || '01') = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -      SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', y.Date || '01') = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /     SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', y.Date || '01') = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS decrease_rate FROM yearmonth y WHERE y.CustomerID = (     SELECT CustomerID     FROM transactions_1k     WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25' )

SELECT      (y2012.total_2012 - y2013.total_2013) / y2012.total_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate FROM      (SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS total_2012       FROM yearmonth       WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25')         AND Date LIKE '2012%') AS y2012,     (SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS total_2013       FROM yearmonth       WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25')         AND Date LIKE '2013%') AS y2013

944: SELECT      ((last_driver_ms - champion_ms) * 100.0 / last_driver_ms) AS faster_percentage FROM (     SELECT          (SELECT milliseconds FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND position = 1 AND time IS NOT NULL) AS champion_ms,         (SELECT MAX(milliseconds) FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND time IS NOT NULL) AS last_driver_ms )

SELECT ((last.last_driver_time - champ.champion_time) / last.last_driver_time) * 100.0 AS faster_percentage FROM (     SELECT milliseconds AS champion_time     FROM results     WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')       AND positionOrder = 1       AND time IS NOT NULL ) AS champ, (     SELECT (champ_inner.champion_time + results.milliseconds) AS last_driver_time     FROM results,          (SELECT milliseconds AS champion_time           FROM results           WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')             AND positionOrder = 1             AND time IS NOT NULL) AS champ_inner     WHERE results.raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')       AND results.positionOrder = (           SELECT MAX(positionOrder)           FROM results           WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')             AND time IS NOT NULL       )       AND results.time IS NOT NULL ) AS last

SELECT      ((last_time - champion_time) / last_time) * 100.0 AS percentage_faster FROM (     SELECT          (SELECT milliseconds FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND positionOrder = 1 AND time IS NOT NULL) AS champion_time,         (SELECT milliseconds FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY positionOrder DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_time )

SELECT ((T2.last_ms - T1.champion_ms) * 100.0 / T2.last_ms) AS percentage_faster FROM (SELECT milliseconds AS champion_ms FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND positionOrder = 1 AND time IS NOT NULL) AS T1, (SELECT milliseconds AS last_ms FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY positionOrder DESC LIMIT 1) AS T2

WITH champion_time AS (     SELECT (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, INSTR(res.time, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 3600000             + CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60000             + CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, ':') + 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000             + CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, '.') + 1) AS INTEGER)) AS champion_ms     FROM races AS r     INNER JOIN results AS res ON r.raceId = res.raceId     WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'     AND res.positionOrder = 1     AND res.time IS NOT NULL ), last_driver_incremental AS (     SELECT (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 2, INSTR(res.time, '.') - 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000             + CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, INSTR(res.time, '.') + 1) AS INTEGER)) AS incremental_ms     FROM races AS r     INNER JOIN results AS res ON r.raceId = res.raceId     WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'     AND res.time IS NOT NULL     AND res.time LIKE '+%'     AND res.positionOrder = (SELECT MAX(positionOrder) FROM results AS res2                              WHERE res2.raceId = r.raceId AND res2.time IS NOT NULL) ) SELECT ((champion_ms + incremental_ms - champion_ms) / (champion_ms + incremental_ms)) * 100.0 AS percentage_faster FROM champion_time, last_driver_incremental

SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.element = 'f' THEN NULL ELSE T1.molecule_id END) * 100.0)      / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS percentage FROM molecule AS T1 LEFT JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '+'
578: SELECT T2.DisplayName, T2.Reputation FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
SELECT T1.DisplayName, T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'

SELECT T2.DisplayName, T2.Reputation FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
SELECT T2.DisplayName, T2.Reputation FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
1146: SELECT T2.team_long_name FROM Team AS T2 WHERE T2.team_api_id = (SELECT away_team_api_id FROM Match GROUP BY away_team_api_id ORDER BY SUM(away_team_goal) DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT DISTINCT T2.team_long_name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id INNER JOIN (     SELECT away_team_api_id, SUM(away_team_goal) AS total_goals     FROM Match     GROUP BY away_team_api_id ) AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.away_team_api_id WHERE T3.total_goals = (     SELECT MAX(total_goals)     FROM (         SELECT SUM(away_team_goal) AS total_goals         FROM Match         GROUP BY away_team_api_id     ) )

SELECT T2.team_long_name FROM Team AS T2 INNER JOIN ( SELECT away_team_api_id FROM Match GROUP BY away_team_api_id HAVING SUM(away_team_goal) = ( SELECT MAX(total_goals) FROM ( SELECT SUM(away_team_goal) AS total_goals FROM Match GROUP BY away_team_api_id ) ) ) AS T1 ON T2.team_api_id = T1.away_team_api_id
SELECT T2.team_long_name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id GROUP BY T1.away_team_api_id ORDER BY SUM(T1.away_team_goal) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.team_long_name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id GROUP BY T1.away_team_api_id HAVING SUM(T1.away_team_goal) = (SELECT MAX(total_goals) FROM (SELECT SUM(away_team_goal) AS total_goals FROM Match GROUP BY away_team_api_id))
1255: SELECT Diagnosis FROM Patient WHERE ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT ID FROM Laboratory WHERE (IGM <= 40 OR IGM >= 400) AND IGM IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.Diagnosis FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE (T1.IGM <= 40 OR T1.IGM >= 400) GROUP BY T2.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Diagnosis) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.Diagnosis FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE (T1.IGM <= 40 OR T1.IGM >= 400) AND T3.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T3.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.Diagnosis FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.IGM IS NOT NULL AND (T1.IGM <= 40 OR T1.IGM >= 400) GROUP BY T2.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE (T2.IGM <= 40 OR T2.IGM >= 400) AND T2.IGM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T3.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(T3.Diagnosis) DESC LIMIT 1
1472: SELECT T1.CustomerID  FROM yearmonth AS T1  INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID  WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM'  GROUP BY T1.CustomerID  HAVING SUM(T1.Consumption) = (     SELECT MIN(total_consumption)      FROM (         SELECT SUM(T3.Consumption) AS total_consumption          FROM yearmonth AS T3          INNER JOIN customers AS T4 ON T3.CustomerID = T4.CustomerID          WHERE T3.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T4.Segment = 'LAM'          GROUP BY T3.CustomerID     ) )

WITH LAMConsumption2012 AS (     SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption     FROM yearmonth y     INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID     WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'       AND c.Segment = 'LAM'     GROUP BY y.CustomerID ) SELECT CustomerID FROM LAMConsumption2012 WHERE TotalConsumption = (SELECT MIN(TotalConsumption) FROM LAMConsumption2012)

SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' AND T1.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(T3.Consumption) FROM yearmonth AS T3 INNER JOIN customers AS T4 ON T3.CustomerID = T4.CustomerID WHERE T3.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T4.Segment = 'LAM')

SELECT CustomerID FROM ( SELECT T1.CustomerID, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS total FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ) WHERE total = ( SELECT MIN(total) FROM ( SELECT SUM(T1.Consumption) AS total FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ) )

SELECT CustomerID FROM ( SELECT T1.CustomerID, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ) AS sub WHERE total_consumption = ( SELECT MIN(total_consumption) FROM ( SELECT SUM(T1.Consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ) )
